title: Final Project — C1 Showcase
description: Finální projekt: demonstrace všech dovedností kurzu. Combines: all tenses · advanced grammar · vocabulary · style · register
notes: C1 checklist: varied grammar, wide vocabulary, appropriate register, coherent structure
✓ Use: inversion, cleft sentences, mixed conditionals, subjunctive, participle clauses
✓ Vocabulary: collocations, idioms, academic word list, discourse markers
✓ Style: formal where needed, natural where appropriate
C2 = near-native: differentiate fine shades of meaning, use idioms naturally

examples.en: Her argument was both nuanced and compelling.
examples.cz: Její argument byl zároveň nuancovaný a přesvědčivý.

examples.en: He expressed his views with remarkable precision.
examples.cz: Vyjádřil své názory s pozoruhodnou přesností.

examples.en: The report was concise yet comprehensive.
examples.cz: Zpráva byla stručná, ale přesto komplexní.

quiz.sentence: A C1 speaker uses ___ grammar structures, not just simple ones.
Using the right ___ (formal/informal) for the situation is key.
A ___ argument acknowledges the other side before rebutting it.

tasks: 2. Vocabulary you wish you had used
